data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user decision-making by limiting choices.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizes the size and distance of interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Larger tap targets for buttons on mobile UI.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Prioritizes aesthetic design to enhance user perception of usability.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs with familiar user patterns from other platforms.
data.technical_spec: Adopts common social media navigation patterns.

data.title: Social Proof Principle
data.description: Encourages user interaction through visible engagement metrics.
data.technical_spec: Display of likes, shares, and comments prominently.
